raw.title: What to do as the world falls apart: A framework for action
raw.excerpt: From the archive | Having spent twenty years articulating the more-than-human predicament, Nate Hagens shares a timely first-pass framework for action and response organized around what to do now, which could be applied in various contexts and at multiple scales.

llm_processed.summary: This article presents a framework for individual and collective action in response to global crises, emphasizing inner work, community resilience, and localized solutions to build stability amid collapse.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Connects to transition towns and degrowth movements by framing collapse as an opportunity for systemic reimagining.
